lea:title: The Pitch Science Fiction 2Q2026
lea:author: Eduard Pech
lea:description: The Pitch Science Fiction is a quarterly publication of science fiction stories by various authors, covering diverse themes. Included in this issue: Table Of Contents Plain
lea:rights: All stories are in the public domain in the USA. All content not marked public domain is copyright 2026 by Eduard Pech. The complete edition is copyright 2026 by Logophilia. Logophilia is an imprint of Logophilia OÜ.
lea:text: Charged with Suicide by Daria Skrinitsa.xhtml
